commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: "Wherefore, then, I send thee to the Gentiles "it is said, "to open their eyes, and to turn them from darkness to light, and from the power of Satan unto God; that they may receive forgiveness of sins, and inheritance among them that are sanctified by faith which is in Me."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Delivering thee That is, from many attempts, both of the Jews and Gentiles, against thee. (Witham)
